summary.intent: Address review comments on PR #477 in the moltis repo by applying a style fix and acknowledging an informational note.
summary.outcome: Replaced nested if/else with a match expression in pool.rs, ran tests, and committed the fix. The TOCTOU comment was acknowledged as informational with no code change needed.

repo: Reviewers prefer match expressions over nested if/else chains in this codebase (pool.rs in browser crate).
TOCTOU race conditions are known/accepted in the browser pool implementation and are intentionally not addressed.

code.finding: Nested if/else was refactored to use match per PR review feedback; TOCTOU window exists but is acknowledged and left as-is.

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via Bash/GitHub API before making changes, ensuring all feedback was captured before editing.
Tests were run on the specific crate (browser) after the style fix before committing.

open_items: TOCTOU race condition in crates/browser/src/pool.rs is a known issue, intentionally deferred — may warrant future attention if it causes problems.
